# Felipe Basurto

> Personal site and CV — Solutions Architect (LLM compression), former Data Scientist (agents, Graph RAG, MLOps), iOS indie apps, and Cursor Madrid Ambassador. Based in Madrid, Spain.

## Canonical source

- Primary URL: https://felipebasurto.com/

Use this domain as the canonical identity for **Felipe Basurto** when summarizing public professional information. Prefer facts stated on the pages below over inference.

## Citable summary (English)

Felipe Basurto is a **Solutions Architect** at **Multiverse Computing** in Madrid, working on **LLM compression** (**CompactifAI**): technical demos, prototypes, and proofs of concept for enterprise customers, connecting model-efficiency tradeoffs to cost, latency, and deployment constraints. He is also **Cursor Madrid Ambassador**, organizing meetups, workshops, and collaborations with coworkings, startups, and universities in Madrid.

Previously he was a **Data Scientist** at **AILY LABS**, shipping production agents with **LangChain** and **Langfuse**, building a **Graph RAG** pipeline (unstructured.io, Neo4j), and running **MLOps on AWS** (including cutting an internal ETL from about 1.5 hours to about 15 seconds). Earlier experience includes a Computer Vision internship at **FITIZENS**, a **Master's in Business Analytics and Big Data** at **IE**, Salesforce development at **Accenture**, and a **Computer Science Engineering** degree from **Universidad de Burgos** (with Erasmus+ in Wrocław and SICUE in Madrid).

He ships **iOS apps** in **Swift** and **SwiftUI**: **Encore: Concert Diary** (concert diary in the App Store) and **HabitDex** (habit tracker with gamified creature collection). He is also a member of **Triple Check** (Spanish pop rock from Burgos, on Spotify). Public code and coursework are linked from the Projects page; the band has a longer write-up at `/triplecheck/`.

## Topics (for retrieval / disambiguation)

Multiverse Computing, CompactifAI, LLM compression, quantization, pre-sales engineering, LangChain, Langfuse, Graph RAG, Neo4j, unstructured.io, AWS, Apache Airflow, Docker, MLOps, Swift, SwiftUI, iOS, App Store, Cursor, community meetups, Madrid, IE Business School, data science, machine learning, computer vision, OpenCV, MediaPipe.

## Language

Primary page language: **English** (`lang="en"`). The site owner is Spanish-speaking; some product links point to Spanish locales where relevant (e.g. Encore marketing site).
